installCommand: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install --omit=dev && npm --prefix api install --omit=dev

rewrites._note: Routes /api/* to the api/index.js serverless function. Destination is /api (NOT /api/index) because Vercel exposes api/index.js at the URL /api — using /api/index makes Vercel look for a function at api/index (no extension), fail, fall through to the catch-all, and return 405.

Catch-all for client-side routes (React Router). The negative lookahead (?!api/) ensures /api/* paths are NEVER rewritten to index.html — even if the explicit API rewrite above fails to match for some reason.
